message.use_psd_for_phs_title: Include the PSD zone in the PHS calculation?
message.use_psd_for_phs_details: Review the calculated PSD zones below. Choose “Yes” if the PSD zone should affect the PHS settings, or “No” if PHS should be calculated independently.
settings.description: Configure chart display and interface language. Changes are applied after pressing OK.
help.overview.title: General Algorithm
help.overview.text: The application reads input data, validates settings, calculates distance zones, PSD/RLD and PHS settings, then builds charts and calculation journals.

message.phs_placeholder_with_psd: PHS: placeholder. The future calculation will include the PSD zone.
message.phs_placeholder_without_psd: PHS: placeholder. The future calculation will run without the PSD zone.
phs.title: PHS
project.confirm_delete: Delete the selected project? This action cannot be undone.
report.no_zone_data: No complete data is available to calculate zone coordinates.
report.phase_ground_inputs_values: X1={x1}; R1={r1}; X0={x0}; R0={r0}; RPFF={rpff}; RFPE={rfpe}; ArgNegRes={arg_neg_res}; ArgDir={arg_dir}
report.psb.title: Power swing blocking setting calculation
report.psb.included_forward: Forward stages included in calculation (t <= 2.5 s)
report.psb.included_reverse: Reverse stages included in calculation (t <= 2.5 s)
report.psb.extremes: KчPSD={k}; forward maxima: X1Fw={x1_fw}, X0Fw={x0_fw}, RFPPFw={rfpp_fw}, RFPEFw={rfpe_fw}; forward minima: ArgDirFw={arg_dir_fw}, ArgNegResFw={arg_neg_res_fw}; reverse maxima: X1Rv={x1_rv}, X0Rv={x0_rv}, RFPPRv={rfpp_rv}, RFPERv={rfpe_rv}; reverse minima: ArgDirRv={arg_dir_rv}, ArgNegResRv={arg_neg_res_rv}; Fл={f_l}.
report.psb.forward_coverage_comment: Covers the maximum blocked stages directed into the line.
report.psb.forward_reverse_intersection_: Checks intersection of the reverse-directed stage with the directional line in quadrant IV.
report.psb.reverse_coverage_comment: Covers the maximum blocked reverse-directed stage.
report.psb.reverse_forward_intersection_: Checks intersection of the forward-directed stage with the directional line in quadrant II.
report.psb.load_angle_comment: Keeps the minimum stage slope angle by Fл.
report.psb.load_cut_primary_delta_commen: ∆RFw(Rv) is entered in secondary values and converted through CT/VT ratios.
report.psb.load_cut_detuning_comment: Calculation by the load detuning condition.
report.psb.load_cut_sensitivity_compare: Compare PSB sensitivity and load cutout settings
report.psb.load_cut_sensitivity_comment: The inner load cutout zone must not exceed the corresponding R1FIn setting.
report.psb.load_cut_ratio_comment: Ratio between the inner and outer load cutout limits.
report.psb.load_cut_angle_comment: The larger Fw/Rv load angle is selected with ∆φ added; the minimum accepted value is 30 deg.
report.psb.max_comment: The maximum value from the listed conditions is selected.
report.psd_geometry_title: Power swing blocking and load cut zone construction
report.psd_engineering_intro: The calculation is performed step by step by the distance-stage coverage conditions, the directional-line intersection checks, and detuning from load modes. Angles used by trigonometric functions are converted from degrees to radians during calculation.
report.psd_included_forward: Forward stages included in the calculation: {stages}.
report.psd_included_reverse: Reverse stages included in the calculation: {stages}.
report.psd_sensitivity_used: Sensitivity coefficient KчPSD is accepted as {value}.
report.distance_stages_table_title: Distance protection stages included in calculation
report.formula_sources_none: Quantities are given directly in the formula.
report.psd_forward_extremes: For forward stages the maximum values are accepted: X1Fw={x1}; X0Fw={x0}; RFPPFw={rfpp}; RFPEFw={rfpe}.
report.psd_reverse_extremes: For reverse stages the maximum values are accepted: X1Rv={x1}; X0Rv={x0}; RFPPRv={rfpp}; RFPERv={rfpe}.
report.psd_slope_and_load_cut: Selection of characteristic slope and load-cut settings
report.psd_max_selected: The maximum of the values ({values}) is selected: {value} {unit}.
report.psd_angle_note: The accepted settings are used to plot the PSD inner and outer zones, as well as the outer load-cut zone on the R-X plane.
validation.psb_inner_outer: Inner PSB characteristic must be smaller than outer characteristic.
validation.no_complete_stage: At least one complete stage is required for calculation.
validation.sensitive_stage_required: Sensitive stage is required for PHS calculation.
